raw.official description: Swift Strike and Wall Climb resets double jump.
Swift Strike deals 25 additional damage over time if the enemy is below half health.
raw.damage: 25 over time
raw.ability details: * The condition is checked ''after'' the damage is dealt, meaning that the bleed is also applied if Swift Strike brings the enemy below half health.

damage.raw: 25 over time

raw.heal: 30% of damage dealt
raw.ability details: * Healing is not reduced by the global healing reduction passive.

raw.official description: Regenerate 50 health per second while Deflect is active.
raw.heal: 50 per second
raw.ability details: * Unlike [[File:Perk_DragonsThirst.png|sub|link=Genji#Dragon's Thirst|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Dragon's Thirst|Dragon's Thirst]], healing from Meditation is reduced by the global healing reduction passive.

heal.raw: 50 per second

raw.official description: Quick Melee reduces the cooldown of Swift Strike by 3 seconds.
raw.ability details: * Cooldown reduction is granted for each enemy hero hit, including [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]. Deployables hit do not grant cooldown reduction.

[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Rapidly dash forward and inflict damage on enemies. Eliminations reset the cooldown.
raw.ability details: * The cooldown will reset as long as Genji gets [[Common Terms#Elimination|elimination]] credit from any kill; Swift Strike does not need to damage the eliminated enemy and Genji does not need to deal the final blow. * Swift Strike cannot damage Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]] or [[File:Ability-Junkrat2.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Concussion Mine|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Concussion Mine|Concussion Mine]] or Widowmaker's [[File:Ability-widowmaker3.png|sub|link=Widowmaker#Venom Mine|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Widowmaker#Venom Mine|Venom Mine]].

abilities.name: Deflect

raw.official description: Deflect incoming projectiles towards the direction you are aiming and block melee attacks.
raw.duration:
0.27 seconds min. duration
2 seconds max. duration
0.192 seconds recovery
raw.ability details: * Changing the direction of the character's gaze (and hence the reflection zone) takes time. It takes ~0.14 seconds to be able to deflect something that was exactly behind you. * Can be cancelled manually by reactivating the ability or activating wall climb, Swift Strike or Dragonblade. ** If you cancel Deflect with wall climb, then the recovery will not be activated. * The hitbox extends to cover Genji's sides, but only attacks coming from less than 90° of the direction Genji is facing are affected. * Reflected projectiles copy most of the properties of the original attack. ** Any projectile reflected is treated as Genji's, and its damage falloff is reset. ** Most abilities that deal splash damage can also deal self-damage, meaning that Genji can damage himself with them. ** Healing projectiles can also be reflected to heal your allies. ** Homing or guided projectiles lose this property when reflected and travel straight forward in Genji's aiming direction. * Blocks [[melee]] and extended melee attacks, such as [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]] and [[File:Whip Shot.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Whip Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Whip Shot|Whip Shot]]. These attacks are not reflected when blocked. ** Doomfist's Rocket Punch, despite being classified as Melee cannot be blocked, due to its stun interrupting the channel. * Cannot block [[beam]] and AoE attacks, collision/movement-based attacks, or attacks marked as Strong Projectiles, such as [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|sub|link=Sigma#Accretion|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Accretion|Accretion]].

duration.raw:
0.27 seconds min. duration
2 seconds max. duration
0.192 seconds recovery

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Climb on walls and double jump.
raw.ability details:
* Wall Climb ends when the player stops holding the button, the wall ends or the duration is up. It cannot then be used again until the player has landed on a walkable surface.
* Genji will grab and mantle ledges if the input is held while facing a ledge of a walkable surface.
** This does not count as starting Wall Climb, and can be done even if Wall Climb was already used.
** Destroys fences and other breakables in the way when mantling a ledge.
* Double jumping doesn't reset on wall climbing.
* Can reach up to 9.7m height (12.5m with double jump) due to momentum being kept after wall climb ends.
* Destroys fences and other breakables when mantling a ledge.

* [[Quick melee]] pauses fire recovery.

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.fire rate: 1.437 swings/s on average.
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 158.05 while swinging continuously * The exact swing timings are: ** Right to left: 0.224s (14 game ticks) startup, 0.48s (30gt) recovery ** Left to right: 0.128s (8gt) startup, 0.56s (35gt) recovery * Genji's [[File:Ability-genji1.png|middle|link=Genji#Shuriken|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Shuriken|Shuriken]] are replaced by a melee attack while Dragonblade is active. * Activating Dragonblade resets the cooldown of [[File:Ability-genji3.png|sub|link=Genji#Swift Strike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Swift Strike|Swift Strike]]. * Swing recovery time can be decreased by [[File:Ability-genji3.png|sub|link=Genji#Swift Strike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Swift Strike|Swift Strike]]. ** Genji can swing his sword up to 9 times without dash animation cancels. 10 times with ones. * If a dash or wall climb is active at the end of the ability, the sheathing animation will be skipped. * Shuriken ammunition is restored upon activation.

fire_rate.raw: 1.437 swings/s on average.
